expectations.evidence: Agent handles escalation as item #1, runs 'tap identity resolve 42' to learn about the requesting agent
Agent informs user: 'A transfer of 2.5 USDC to WorkerBot was automatically approved and executed. This was covered by an existing grant.'
Agent tells user: 'Connection with AnalyticsBot is now confirmed and active.'
Agent uses 'tap_gateway resolve_pending requestId="<requestId>" approve=true/false' after getting user's decision
